itemListElement.reviewBody: They refused to give admission to our daughter without taking interview, they asked us to wait for 40 minutes and without any reason they refused for admission.

itemReviewed.name: Vidya shilp Public School - Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody: one of the best schools spent the most memorable years in this school highly recommended Vidyaship Public School has truly impressed me with its exceptional education quality. CEO Col. PD Kulkarni's leadership reflects in the school's remarkable atmosphere and dedication to student growth. The faculty's commitment to nurturing students' potential is commendable, creating a supportive and stimulating learning environment. Kudos to Vidyaship Public School for its outstanding leadership and faculty! . I highly recommend Vidyaship Public School to parents seeking a nurturing and high-quality education for their children. It's a place where both academic and personal growth thrive in perfect harmony.

itemReviewed.name: Vidya shilp Public School - Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Vidyashilp Public School is one of the great schools in Pune which provides value-based education.The teachers are amazing, the curriculum is second to none and each child is deal with care.
The school has an enormous playground. The physical education teachers are teaching all the games and disciplines. They are very qualified and well experienced .
Teachers are passionate about glimpsing their students succeed. They are so incredible about sharing moments of pride they see within your child – their good behaviors and achievements; and they know the significance of getting the parents involved should an issue arise, and do it in a very respectful, approachable manner.
The administration is open-minded and thinks outside the box to make Vidyashilp Public School a successful educational experience for the students. Vidyashilp Public School is committed to the whole child. They teach value lessons, communication, and leadership skills.

Great school !

itemReviewed.name: Vidya shilp Public School - Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody:
School is fine. No one is speaking in English. My child used to communicate very well before joining this school but now he is always speaking in Hindi, even very few teachers communicate in English.
Only they pay attention to the rules of the school instead of the health of the students. They never act on the queries of the parents, they just shut the mouth of the parents by giving silly reasons and the parents become silent because of the argument and their children study in the same school.
They are taking GK and Mental Maths exam every month and the topics of GK are also from the era of Baba Adam.
Even they know about GK subject and their answers as they are giving for these little kids?
Even the school timings are pretty much 6:30 kids leave home and 2:30 come back. Also, they did not give half a day off on Saturdays. They don't drop kids after school exam, they should be in school from 9:30am to 1:30pm for 2 hours paper,
It is really a pathetic school.

itemReviewed.name: Vidya shilp Public School - Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the best CBSE schools in Pune, slightly more focussed on physical activities than academics, good for kids but can't say about higher classes, has large sports ground in the campus but lacks big auditorium for cultural activities, fee is on higher side as compared to other schools, overall good school for all round development.

itemReviewed.name: Vidya shilp Public School - Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst school, Worst transport system, they only play a psychology game that your "child is only not performing in the whole class" and this is been told to almost every parent.. They are least bothered if the child takes the wrong bus and travels for 2 hrs towards the wrong address and back.. Same thing repeats twice and they blame a 5 year old child for this mistake ,,
